reviews.review_description: I grabbed this as soon as it came out. I've been working on it straight out and am about half way through. Will update when finished but wanted to let people know how good it is. I always loved these sorts of games on my phone and it is such a special pleasure to be able to manipulate them in VR. The workmanship is top notch. It almost feels like really working with wooden puzzles. The music is peaceful and relaxing and adds to the overall experience. Love the cute little bird that grows up as you play. My only wish is hand tracking support. It is fine without, but that would really complete the experience for me. It is a natural way to interact with these kinds of puzzles. Thanks so much for putting so much care and heart into this wonderful game :)

reviews.review_title: A game you can play for minutes or hours
reviews.review_description:
A great looking game.
The puzzles are well thought out and get progressively more difficult at a good pace.
Holding the blocks felt realistic and there is a nice haptic feedback as you try to move the parts.
I like that you can try as many as you like at your own pace and return for more at your leisure.
And the music is quite tranquil.

Interlocked is one of those games, you dive into for a few minutes and you end up hopping from island to island for a few hours.
The whole ambience is just so calming, the puzzles are very intriguing,spinning, turning, moving yhe interlocking parts to free them, the simple idea is very addictive, jumping from island to island, challenges ramping up as you get further into the game, such a lot of brain teasing fun.
Nice one by the dev, he deserves credit and I know our group will love this type of puzzling.

reviews.review_title: A Cozy, Zen-Like VR Puzzle Experience
reviews.review_description: This game is such a unique puzzle experience, perfect for VR. It has comforting, calming aesthetics and music that put me in a zen-like state, and I had so much fun playing it! I’m looking forward to continuing to play and also to seeing what this talented studio creates next.

Interlocked: Puzzle Islands is a relaxing and highly satisfying VR puzzle experience. The tactile manipulation of 3D puzzles feels natural and rewarding. A perfect game to unwind while keeping your brain engaged.

This has blown my mind!! I won this on Facebook and I am so glad I did! It makes me use my braincells I didn't think i had!! If you love something that will challenge you, but not get to you so you don't throw your headset out the window, this is for you!! Go for it, life is to short. Warning it was frustrating but, patience is the key!! Moonoggi haha. Thanks 😊

Hands down to the idea of this kind of puzzles. I love it. It engages you to think like chess and anticipate your next moves to unlock each piece. Excellent price.
Now we just need an AR version for it and it would be gold.
One more thing: I wish I could see my hands and use hand tracking. 
Keep the great work!

This game is challenging but also relaxing. At first I thought there is no way I can figure this out, but then i was concentrating on how each piece moved and the relaxing music, really helped my mind focus and slowly but surely, I figured it out! The music and the island atmosphere give you a very nice sense peace and quiet while you figure out each puzzle. Then you get the satisfaction of solving the puzzle. I can see when I want to relax and have a peaceful place to go, this place will be my go to. Great on many levels, I recommend this puzzle for everyone. 

The controls seem very intuitive and there is a great tutorial to help you learn, but it doesnt take much time at all to learn. 

Enjoy and relax with this excellent puzzle game!

I am a fan of puzzle games and I enjoyed this one a lot.
Environments are nice, performance smooth, puzzles engaging.
Hopefully more puzzles will come, because game can be solved in day or two, what makes it sweet but short experience.
Two points for improvement would be implementation of  hands tracking and possibility to assemble puzzles as well. This would increase playtime and difficulty geometrically.

Great little game around solving wooden block puzzles. Excellent background music and animation. Controls are intuitive and the puzzles can be challenging. Definitely will be solving the rest for awhile. Good way to wind down.

Well this is a great little puzzler, a great way to keep your mind sharp.  Perfect tutorial to get you started, the puzzles do get challanging quite quick which suprised me.  I am looking forward to seeing where my journey with my newly hatched friend takes me.  I would ask the dev to concider, if possible, having an option to choose music type.  The one playing I did have have to turn off, not a negative it just I would love to select my own genre of music to concentrate too.  Well done devs.
